## What is online proctoring?

Online proctoring monitors and supervises candidates during the pre-employment or upskilling assessment. Online proctored exam use audio, video, and artificial intelligence technology to ensure the reliability and authenticity of the assessment.

* * *

## Using online proctoring to enhance people strategies

Our online proctoring tools are designed using artificial intelligence technology to hire the right people in the business.

![]()

Verify the authenticity of candidates

### Verify the authenticity of candidates

Eliminate candidate impersonation using multi-factor and identity authentication.

![]()

Regulate the test environment

### Regulate the test environment

Monitor the candidate's browser, search engine, data sharing, and external ports.

![]()

Proctor candidates remotely

### Proctor candidates remotely

Assess candidates remotely using the detection of speech, movement, and impersonation.

![]()

Use the right proctoring strategy

### Use the right proctoring strategy

Use the right proctoring combination to assess the right skill set for your business.

![]()

Use a secure proctoring platform

### Use a secure proctoring platform

Assess candidates using an online proctoring platform recognized globally for data security.

![]()

Improve hiring decisions

### Improve hiring decisions

Improve reliability of assessment and accuracy of cheating evaluation by 98%.

## Power your people processes using our proctoring software

Auto proctoring

Use automated image, video, and audio proctoring for reliable assessment outcomes.

Live proctoring

Integrated live human proctoring to ensure the efficiency and authenticity of assessments.

Record and review proctoring

Evaluate assessment reliability and validity using record and review proctoring strategy.

Dual camera proctoring

Provide end-to-end security for your exams with proctoring from all angles with the secondary camera.
